calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Vacated

Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement (Counsel To Notice Motion)
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roberto G. Ripamonti, Esq. of Lohr Ripamonti & Segarich LLP, T:415.429.4718, for plaintiff;
Alexandria Pavlidakis, Esq. of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP, T:650.614.7372, for defendant.

RULING: There being no other appearance or objection to the settlement, and for good cause shown, the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT is GRANTED.

ORDER SIGNED in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Incentive Award
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roberto G. Ripamonti, Esq. of Lohr Ripamonti & Segarich LLP, T:415.429.4718, for plaintiff;
Alexandria Pavlidakis, Esq. of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP, T:650.614.7372, for defendant.

RULING: There being no other appearance or objection, and to the satisfaction of the Court,

PLAINTIFF SEAN DEVRIES' Motion For An Award Of Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Incentive Award is GRANTED.

ORDER SIGNED in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

MOTION For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Roberto Ripamonti of the law offices of Lohr Ripamonti & Segarich LLP (415-683-7941) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Alexandra Pavlidakis of the law offices of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (650-614-7372) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The Court hears from both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PLAINTIFF SEAN DEVRIES' MOTION For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED. Any person may appear in court and object orally even if no written objection is filed. Hearing on Plaintiff's Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement is set for January 16, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302/Law and Motion. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)
